title: US journalist Shelly Kittleson kidnapped in Baghdad
summary_full: The US state department says a suspect in her abduction has ties to an Iran-backed militia group, Kataib Hezbollah.
summary_public: The US state department says a suspect in her abduction has ties to an Iran-backed militia group, Kataib Hezbollah.
